content:
The user wants me to extract the content of the image into a JSON format. **1. Analyze the image:** The image is a page from a datasheet for the TLV757P. - **Header:** Texas Instruments logo, website, part number (TLV757P), document number (SBVS322C), and date (October 2017 – Revised March 2024). - **Section 5.4:** "Thermal Information". - **Table:** A table detailing thermal metrics for different packages (DYD, DBV, DRV) and units (5 PINS, 6 PINS). It includes parameters like $R_{\theta JA}$, $\psi_{JT}$, $\psi_{JB}$ for EVM and JEDEC. - **Footnotes:** Two footnotes explaining the table data. - **Section 5.5:** "Electrical Characteristics". - **Text:** Description of operating conditions. - **Table:** A detailed table of electrical characteristics including parameters, test conditions, min, typ, max, and unit. **2. Extract content:** **Header:** - Logo: Texas Instruments - URL: www.ti.com - Part Number: TLV757P - Doc Number: SBVS322C - Date: OCTOBER 2017 – REVISED MARCH 2024 **Section 5.4:** - Title: 5.4 Thermal Information **Table 1 (Thermal Metrics):** - Columns: PCB, THERMAL METRIC(1) (2), TLV757 (DYD (SOT-23), DBV (SOT-23), DRV (SON)), UNIT - Rows: EVM ($R_{\theta JA}$, $\psi_{JT}$, $\psi_{JB}$), JEDEC ($R_{\theta JA}$, $R_{\theta JC(top)}$, $R_{\theta JB}$, $\psi_{JT}$, $\psi_{JB}$, $R_{\theta JC(bot)}$) **Footnotes:** - (1) For more information... - (2) JEDEC thermal metrics apply... **Section 5.5:** - Title: 5.5 Electrical Characteristics - Text: over operating free-air temperature range... **Table 2 (Electrical Characteristics):** - Columns: PARAMETER, TEST CONDITIONS, MIN, TYP, MAX, UNIT - Rows: $V_{IN}$, $V_{OUT}$, Output accuracy (4 rows), Line regulation, Load regulation (2 rows), Load regulation, Ground current (3 rows), $I_{SHDN}$, Output current limit (2 rows), $I_{SC}$ **Footer:** - Copyright © 2024 Texas Instruments Incorporated - Submit Document Feedback - Page 5 - Product Folder Links: TLV757P **3. Format as JSON:** I will structure the JSON to represent the document's layout and content. ```json [{"bbox": [85, 34, 247, 80], "category": "header", "text": "Texas Instruments\nwww.ti.com"}, {"bbox": [848, 56, 912, 68], "category": "header", "text": "TLV757P"}, {"bbox": [616, 68, 912, 80], "category": "header", "text": "SBVS322C – OCTOBER 2017 – REVISED MARCH 2024"}, {"bbox": [89, 95, 297, 111], "category": "title", "text": "5.4 Thermal Information"}, {"bbox": [89, 116, 906, 311], "category": "table", "text": "
PCBTHERMAL METRIC(1) (2)TLV757UNIT
DYD (SOT-23)DBV (SOT-23)DRV (SON)
5 PINS5 PINS6 PINS

ψJTJunction-to-top characterization parameter14.223.3N/A°C/W
ψJBJunction-to-board characterization parameter35.967.8N/A°C/W
JEDECRθJAJunction-to-ambient thermal resistance92.5231.1100.2°C/W
RθJC(top)Junction-to-case (top) thermal resistance119.8118.4108.5°C/W
RθJBJunction-to-board thermal resistance45.864.464.3°C/W

ψJBJunction-to-board characterization parameter44.963.864.8°C/W

EVM metrics apply to the LP087A EVM with an exposed pad SOT-23-5 (DYD) layout."}, {"bbox": [89, 391, 339, 406], "category": "title", "text": "5.5 Electrical Characteristics"}, {"bbox": [89, 411, 906, 439], "category": "text", "text": "over operating free-air temperature range ($T_{J} = -40^{\\circ}C$ to $+125^{\\circ}C$), $V_{IN} = V_{OUT} + 0.5$ V or 1.45 V (whichever is greater), $I_{OUT} = 1$ mA, $V_{EN} = V_{IN}$, and $C_{IN} = C_{OUT} = 1$ $\\mu$F (unless otherwise noted); all typical values are at $T_{J} = 25^{\\circ}C$."}, {"bbox": [89, 438, 906, 740], "category": "table", "text": "
